title: Stock Market Today (Apr. 30, 2026): S&P 500 caps off best month since 2020 as Alphabet rallies, Apple beats

excerpt: The S&P 500 had its best month since 2020, with Alphabet and Apple leading the rally. Qualcomm and Alphabet saw significant gains, while Meta Platforms and Microsoft experienced losses. For detailed updates, refer to financial news sources.

content.introduction: The S&P 500 had its best month since 2020, with Alphabet and Apple leading the rally. Qualcomm and Alphabet saw significant gains, while Meta Platforms and Microsoft experienced losses. For detailed updates, refer to financial news sources.
